description.ko: 건축적 정밀함과 디지털 혼돈의 교차점을 경험하십시오. KURO-X는 파편화된 데이터와 날카로운 미래형 라인의 아름다움을 담은 기하학적 글리치 테마로 기존의 틀을 깨뜨립니다.
description.en: Experience the intersection of architectural precision and digital chaos. KURO-X breaks the mold with a geometric glitch theme that captures the beauty of fragmented data and sharp, futuristic lines.

prompt: Cinematic high-tech product shot of KURO-X surrounded by sharp geometric glitch effects, fragmented polygonal prisms, digital distortion artifacts, neon cyan and deep violet lighting, sleek matte black surface textures, 8k resolution, futuristic cyber-noir aesthetic.
